zh.lifeSummary: 當Tittensor ingen kenneth於大約1020年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Banquo MacKenneth41歲，母親Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland39歲。她於1046年之前與Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1089年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼享年71歲，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tittensor ingen kenneth于大约1020年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Banquo MacKenneth41岁，母亲Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland39岁。她于1046年之前与Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1089年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼享年71岁，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

nameMeanings.name: ingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (western Ashkenazic) and German: habitational name from Bingen in the Rhineland, Germany.
Norwegian: habitational name from a farmstead so named with Old Norse bingr ‘cow stall, field, small farm’.

variants.name: Bing
meanings: English (Kent): habitational name from Byng in Suffolk or a topographic name for someone who lived in a hollow (metaphorical use of Middle English bing ‘coffer, bin’). Alternatively, it may be from the Middle English word bing ‘coffer, bin’ (from Old Norse bingr ‘bed, bolster, heap, stook of corn’). This word is the source of the placename.
Jewish (western Ashkenazic) and Danish: habitational name from Bing, a shortened form of   Bingen  .
Danish: metonymic occupational name, from bing ‘storage bin for grain’, for someone who either made or used such containers.

nameMeanings.name: kenneth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: now considered in Scotland as the Gaelic equivalent of the personal name Coinneach, the name of an Irish saint generally Anglicized in Ireland as Canice. However, Kenneth was originally the Anglicized form of Gaelic Cionaodh (see McKinney ), a personal name ultimately of Pictish origin. Etymologically, this surname is equivalent to Kenny (which can arise from either personal name) and McKenzie (which is from Coinneach).

variants.name: McKinney
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cionaodha or Mac Cionaoith ‘son of ç’, an early Gaelic personal name popular from the ninth century and possibly derived from Pictish.

Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnigh ‘son of Coinneach’, an Old Irish personal name, borne by a Christian saint and Anglicized in Ireland as Canice, which was treated in Scotland as equivalent to Kenneth . This surname was usually Anglicized in Scotland as McKenzie , but is otherwise hard to distinguish from sense 1 above.

variants.name: Kinnick
meanings: Scottish: from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Coinneach (see Kenneth ).

variants.name: Kinnison
meanings: variant of Cunieson, a patronymic from the personal name Conan, which was borne by an illegitimate son of Henry, Duke of Atholl, from whom many bearers are descended.
patronymic from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personalname Coinneach (see Kenneth ).

variants.name: Kenny
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Declan, Dermot, Fergus, Caitlin, Clodagh, Colm, Eilis, Fergal, Finbarr, Finola.

Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Coinnigh ‘descendant of Coinneach’, an Old Irish personal name that later came to be treated as equivalent to Scottish Kenneth . This was borne by a 6th-century monk and saint who gave his name to the town of Kilkenny ‘church of Coinneach’.

variants.name: Kinahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Eoin.
Irish (Offaly and Kilkenny): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Coinneacháin, from the personal name Coinneachan, a pet form of Coinneach (see Kenneth ).

nameMeanings.name: Tittensor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Tittensor (Staffs), recorded as Titneshovere about 1200.

en.lifeSummary: When Tittensor ingen kenneth was born about 1020, in Normandy, France, her father, Banquo MacKenneth, was 41 and her mother, Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland, was 39. She married Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol before 1046, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died about 1089, in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 71, and was buried in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tittensor ingen kenneth est née environ 1020, à Normandie, France, son père, Banquo MacKenneth, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol avant 1046, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1089, à Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tittensor ingen kenneth um 1020 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Banquo MacKenneth 41 und ihre Mutter Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland 39. Sie hat vor 1046 in Europa Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb um 1089 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tittensor ingen kenneth è nata il circa 1020 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Banquo MacKenneth, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol prima del 1046, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1089, nel Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

ja.lifeSummary: Tittensor ingen kennethが約1020年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Banquo MacKennethは41歳，母Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotlandは39歳であった。1046年以前にヨーロッパでAlain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1089年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインドル-デ-ブレタグンで71歳で死去し，パキスタンآزاد جموں و کشمیرブリaルにて埋葬された。

ko.Burial Details Unknown: 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a
ko.lifeSummary: Tittensor ingen kenneth(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Banquo MacKenneth(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1046년 이전 우럽에서 Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1089년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 도-데-브레타그니에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tittensor ingen kenneth nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Banquo MacKenneth, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol antes 1046, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1089, em Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Paquistão.

ru.Burial Details Unknown: буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tittensor ingen kenneth родилась около 1020 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Banquo MacKenneth было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol перед 1046 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла около 1089 г. в местности дол-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан.

sm.about 1020–about 1089: e tusa o le 1020–e tusa o le 1089

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tittensor ingen kenneth nació aproximadamente 1020, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Banquo MacKenneth, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Muldivana de Atholl, Princess of Scotland, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol antes de 1046, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1089, en Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistán.
